Těšíme se na Vaši zprávu.

title: Junior Data Scientist
description_html:
Career Area

Technology, Digital and Data

Job Description

Your Work Shapes the World at Caterpillar Inc.

When you join Caterpillar, you're joining a global team who cares not just about the work we do – but also about each other. We are the makers, problem solvers, and future world builders who are creating stronger, more sustainable communities. We don't just talk about progress and innovation here – we make it happen, with our customers, where we work and live. Together, we are building a better world, so we can all enjoy living in it.

Who is CAT Digital? What do we do?

Big machines require big thinking. Are you looking for your next big challenge?

Cat® Digital is the digital and technology arm of Caterpillar Inc., leveraging the latest technologies to build industry leading digital solutions for our customers and dealers. With over one million connected assets worldwide, our teams use data, technology, advanced analytics, telematics, and AI capabilities to help our customers build a better world.

Working with a Fortune 100 leader, you can build your career on a global scale and take advantage of development opportunities with emerging technologies. We’ve created an inclusive environment for you to explore your passions, make an impact and do the work that really matters. Join Us.

Job Opportunity

Cat Digital is expanding its operations and opening a new branch in Slovakia. We are seeking talented individuals to join our team to help us establish and grow our presence, organization, culture, which will drive our digital product development efforts. As a member of our team, you will have the opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies and collaborate with top professionals working on very high impact and visibility products. Don't miss this chance to join and support digital innovation for a global leader in heavy machinery!

What will you do?

As a Junior Data Scientist At Cat Digital's Slovakian Branch, You Will Contribute To Design, Development And Deployment Of Caterpillar’s State Of The Art Digital Program. You Will Also

  • Contribute to anomaly detection and prediction capabilities, focusing on noise reduction and model improvements.
  • Package models as analytics ready outputs (exception triggers, scores, confidence, salient channels) and integrate with data lake pipelines for delivery to the Foresight UI (CAT’s in-house monitoring solution).
  • Partner with product & application teams to wire model outputs into Suggested/Auto Recommendations and Enhanced Analytic Context in CMA workflows.
  • Build reproducible training/evaluation pipelines; contribute to MLOps (data versioning, model registry, CI/CD, monitoring, drift checks).
  • Track key metrics (precision/recall, exception noise, lead time, coverage) and participate in feedback driven retraining using CMA and recommendation signals.

This position works directly with Slovakia based engineering leadership and Cat Digital IT in the US.

What You Have

  • Effective Communications: Understanding of effective communication concepts, tools and techniques; ability to effectively transmit, receive, and accurately interpret ideas, information, and needs through the application of appropriate communication behaviors.
  • Relevant degree in Computer Science or similar field.
  • Solid Python (pandas, NumPy), PyTorch or TensorFlow, and SQL skills; comfort with notebooks and code reviews.
  • Hands-on experience with timeseries machine learning and strong interest in Attentional/Transformer methods for sequential data.
  • Familiarity with model evaluation beyond accuracy (e.g., class imbalance, precision/recall, calibration, lead time).

Top Candidates Will Have

  • Experience with Snowflake (or similar cloud data warehouse), Airflow/MLflow, Docker/Kubernetes, Grafana/Power BI.
  • Knowledge of interpretability techniques for sequential models (feature/step attributions, attention visualization).

What We Offer

At Cat Digital, we are committed to fostering a culture of innovation and continuous learning, and we believe in investing in the development of our employees. As a member of our team, you will have access to a wide range of training and development opportunities, as well as very competitive compensation and benefits packages, like:

  • 2 300+ euros / month gross
  • Performance related annual cash incentive
  • Industry leading Pension plan
  • 5 days of extra vacation above the legislative requirement
  • Attractive Life insurance
  • 1 volunteering day
  • Multisport Card

Take the chance to apply now for this position at Cat Digital Slovakia branch!

Contract Type

Full-time.

Place Of Work

Kosice, Slovakia

Additional Information

Please frequently check the email associated with your application, including the junk/spam folder, as this is the primary correspondence method. If you wish to know the status of your application – please use the candidate log-in on our career website as it will reflect any updates to your status.

Caterpillar is an Equal Opportunity Employer and considers applicants for all positions without regard to race, color, religion or belief, sex, age, national origin, citizenship status, marital status, military/veteran status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical or mental disability or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws.

Caterpillar is committed to creating a dynamic work environment that values diversity and inclusion, respect and integrity, customer focus, and innovation. For more information, visit https://www.caterpillar.com/en/careers/why-caterpillar.html

Follow us on Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

When you join Caterpillar, you're joining a global team who cares not just about the work we do – but also about each other. We are the makers, problem solvers, and future world builders who are creating stronger, more sustainable communities. Cat® Digital is the digital and technology arm of Caterpillar Inc., leveraging the latest technologies to build industry leading digital solutions for our customers and dealers. What will you do?

Requirements

As a Junior Business Analysts you will gather and document user and client requirements, support the development and testing of new products or services, collect feedback from clients, and recommend improvements to enhance performance and user satisfaction within the One Funnel team. The One Funnel initiative is a strategic transformation program aimed at streamlining and aligning dealer actions across the enterprise. Its core goal is to enhance customer experience and dealer efficiency by co-creating a single, prioritized list of measurable dealer actions, leveraging both Caterpillar and dealer data. You will be also:

  • Assisting in the development, testing, and delivery of services/products; Analyzing existing offerings, preparing technical documentation, and recommending upgrades.
  • Conducting market research to do a comparative analysis of competitor offerings and provide recommendations for developing a more effective product/service.
  • Identifying user/client requirements for a product or service and defining technical specifications; Preparing technical documentation and sharing them with senior analysts and technical teams.
  • Supporting senior analysts by fulfilling their data requests, preparing reports, and providing technical assistance;

What You Have

  • Business Data Analysis: Knowledge of business data analysis; ability to collect, identify, analyze and interpret business data using various kinds of techniques to meet business needs and requirements.
  • Requirements Analysis: Knowledge of tools, methods, and techniques of requirement analysis; ability to elicit, analyze and record required business functionality and non-functionality requirements to ensure the success of a system or software development project.
  • Technical Writing/Documentation: Knowledge of technical writing; ability to write technical documents such as manuals, reports, guidelines or documents on standards, processes and applications.

Top Candidates Will Also Have

  • Ability to collect and analyze data from various sources to provide insights and recommendations.
  • Ability to effectively collaborate with business partners to gather data requirements
  • Passion for leveraging data to drive business value and make informed decisions
  • Experience with MS Power BI
  • Knowledge of SQL databases

title: PLC Programmer
description_html:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.

This Position reports to:

Department Manager




PLC Programmer

Connect your career with ABB – a global company contributing to the transformation of society and industry towards a more productive and sustainable future.

We are looking for candidates for the position of PLC Programmer at the ABB Operational Center Europe, with branches in Ostrava, Plzeň, and Brno.

In this role, you will work on industrial automation projects in areas such as:

  • Energy, including green energy
  • Marine transportation
  • Mining and mineral processing
  • Pharmaceuticals and chemicals

Examples of real projects we’ve worked on:

  • Jansz-Io project – natural gas extraction using unique subsea power station technology enabling a lower carbon footprint
  • Northvolt project – battery production with an 80% lower carbon footprint compared to fossil fuel-based manufacturing
  • Wonder of the Seas project – complete automation for the world’s largest cruise ship

The work model for the role is: hybrid

This role is contributing to the Process Automation in Ostrava, Plzeň or Brno

You will be mainly accountable for:

  • Programming control applications based on functional specifications
  • Function testing internally and with customers
  • Commissioning equipment at customer sites
  • Documenting project progress and creating technical documentation


Qualifications For The Role

  • At least a high school education in electrical engineering
  • Experience in automation and PLC programming (we provide training for graduates)
  • English at a communicative level (collaboration with international customers and teams)
  • Willingness to travel – business trips within Europe
  • Independence and motivation to work in an international team


Benefits

We also offer our employees the following benefits:

  • Flexible working hours
  • Working hours of 7.5 hours/day
  • Possibility of working from home (Home Office) with a financial contribution
  • 25 days of vacation
  • Annual financial bonus
  • Annual salary review
  • Meal allowance
  • Contribution to the benefits portal (2-3% of monthly salary)
  • Opportunity for further career growth in the Czech Republic and worldwide
  • MultiSport card
  • Opportunity for education – internal/external professional courses, language courses, and conferences
  • Reward for recommending a new employee, on work anniversaries, or upon retirement
  • Company events (Christmas party, teambuilding, family days, and more)
  • Assistance line – professional psychological counseling
  • Extra leave for extraordinary life events and support for expectant parents
  • Office with good transport accessibility
  • Company parking for employees commuting from outside Ostrava
  • Possibility to take yoga classes directly at the workplace
  • Table football and darts directly at the workplace
  • Accident insurance
  • Discounts on ABB electrical installation materials
  • Discounts with our partners (electronics, gastronomy, car purchases, train transport, etc.)

A Future Opportunity

Please note that this position is part of our talent pipeline and not an active job opening at this time. By applying, you express your interest in future career opportunities with ABB.

We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about us and see the impact of our work across the globe.

title: Intern - System Test
description_html:
Work Schedule

Standard (Mon-Fri)

Environmental Conditions

Office

Our group

At Metals & Minerals (M&M) team, we develop and maintain software for Optical-Emission and X-Ray spectrometers. Our solutions are essential for our customers from metallurgy, cement, and mining industries to advance their technologies and products while become more energy-efficient, and environment-friendly.

As a member of an international team of scientists, software developers, and engineers, you will cope with tasks related to verification of spectrometer control software in combination with real and simulated spectrometers.

Technologies we use

We work with wide range of tools and technologies, but these will form the core of your work duties:

  • Linux-based embedded computer for instrument control and status reporting running C#/.NET application with React/TS frontend
  • Test automation and tools using Gherkin/Playwright, Python, and various command line tools
  • Cooperation tools like Jira, Confluence, Jama, GitHub

Daily Challenges

You'll be part of a software development team working on our spectrometer control software. As a QA engineer you will work in close collaboration with developers and:

  • Get trained in spectroscopy-related physics and chemistry to understand the context of our applications and spectrometers
  • Perform tests on simulators and in our laboratory on real instruments
  • Learn something new every day!

Knowledge, Skills, Abilities

  • Good command of English for daily written and spoken communication
  • Eagerness to learn new things, passion for excellence
  • Curiosity about new technologies and material science
  • Junior coding skills in Python/TypeScript/C#/Gherkin
  • Prior experience in software testing or scientific background in physics is a bonus, but you may learn on the go.

Benefits

  • Modern workspace: high-performance laptop and dual/wide monitor setup are our standard, further office equipment based on personal preferences
  • Work environment with relax zones, fresh fruits and vegetables, gym, outside playground, physiotherapy, and massages in the building.
  • Brand-new dedicated space equipped with VR headset, recording studio for your videos, music or podcasts, Lego Mindstorms, 3D printer, Arduino and much more

title: DATOVÝ ANALYTIK – DATA WAREHOUSE & REPORTING
description_html:
RENOMIA – středoevropská jednička v pojišťovnictví hledá nové talenty! Jsme největší pojišťovací makléř a firma orientovaná na Risk managment u našich klientů, v České republice. Na trhu působíme 32 let a kanceláře máme ve 13 zemích regionu CEE. Partnerství s akcionářsky spřízněnou společností Gallagher, třetím největším globálním pojišťovacím makléřem, nám umožňuje poskytovat služby po celém světě. Díky unikátnímu spojení hodnot rodinné firmy a mezinárodního know-how nabízíme jedinečné pracovní prostředí a stabilní zázemí. Připojte se k nám a staňte se součástí příběhu, který mění svět pojišťovnictví!

Chceš pracovat s daty, která mají skutečný dopad na rozhodování firmy? Baví tě kombinace analytického myšlení, moderních technologií a hledání hodnoty v číslech? Pak hledáme právě tebe!

🚀 Co Tě u Nás Čeká

  • Budeš součástí BI týmu, který tvoří datové srdce naší firmy
  • Práce s datovým skladem a jeho rozvojem – od návrhu až po optimalizaci
  • Tvorba interaktivních reportů a dashboardů v Power BI, které pomáhají businessu k lepším rozhodnutím
  • Near-realtime datová analýza, emebedování reportů do aplikací a zapojení agentních systémů do reportingu
  • Transformace a modelování dat v BigQuery a DBT
  • Spolupráce s kolegy napříč firmou na definici a realizaci datových potřeb
  • Monitoring kvality dat a hledání cest, jak zlepšit naši datovou infrastrukturu
  • Zapojení do DevOps procesů (verzování, CI/CD, deployment modelů)

🛠️ S čím u nás budeš pracovat

  • Power BI – vizualizace a reporting
  • Google BigQuery – analýza velkých datových sad pomocí SQL
  • DBT (Data Build Tool) – transformace a dokumentace datových pipeline
  • DevOps základy – Git, CI/CD, deployment

🌟 Koho hledáme

  • Máš zkušenosti s datovými sklady a SQL
  • Ideálně už umíš pracovat s Power BI, BigQuery nebo DBT – pokud ne, nevadí, důležitá je chuť se učit
  • Zajímá tě AI a moderní technologie v datovém světě
  • Jsi analytický typ, který rád hledá souvislosti a navrhuje řešení
  • Nechybí ti samostatnost, zodpovědnost a schopnost spolupráce v týmu

💡 Proč k nám

  • Práce na smysluplných projektech, kde tvoje analýzy uvidíš v reálném byznysovém dopadu
  • Možnost učit se od zkušeného BI týmu a rozvíjet se v nejmodernějších technologiích
  • Prostředí, kde se podporuje inovace, otevřenost a sdílení nápadů
  • Stabilní firma s vizí, kde se spojuje profesionalita s lidským přístupem

Naše benefity – proč u nás budete chtít pracovat?

  • Zázemí lídra na trhu. Jsme stabilní česká společnost s nadnárodním dosahem. Na trhu působíme už od roku 1993 a jsme jedničkou ve svém oboru. Naši klienti se na nás spoléhají díky profesionálním službám a odbornosti.
  • Skvělé prostředí, kde vládne férovost a lidský přístup. Na Atmoskopu 87 % zaměstnanců oceňuje své kolegy a 85 % své nadřízené. Otevřená komunikace a týmová spolupráce nejsou jen fráze – opravdu to tu žijeme.
  • Flexibilita na prvním místě. Pracujte tak, jak vám to vyhovuje – kombinujeme 3 dny v kanceláři a 2 dny na Home Office. Flexibilní pracovní doba vám navíc umožní přizpůsobit den vašim potřebám (v kanceláři od 9:00 do 16:00, zbytek času je vás).
  • Více volna, více času na sebe a rodinu. Máme 5 týdnů dovolené a navíc 3 extra dny na rodinu (Family Days). K tomu přidáváme den volna na dobrovolnictví nebo podporu vaší dobročinné aktivity prostřednictvím grantu až 15 000 Kč.
  • Odpočinek i zábava. V naší Cafeterii najdete ročně 10 200 bodů (1 bod = 1 Kč) na dovolenou, sport, kulturu nebo volný čas. Stravenky jsou samozřejmostí (130 Kč na den) a můžete se těšit i na dotovanou Multisport kartu.
  • Odměňujeme loajalitu i úspěchy. Dvakrát ročně získáte odměnu za vaše výsledky (13. a 14. mzda). K tomu přidáváme věrnostní bonusy za odpracované roky a opravdu atraktivní odměnu za doporučení nového kolegy/kolegyně.
  • Výhodné produkty, které vám usnadní život. Nabízíme zvýhodněné podmínky u našich partnerských služeb – od hypoték přes cestovní pojištění, pojištění nemovitosti nebo auta, až po leasing. A přispíváme na doplňkové penzijní spoření až 30 000 Kč ročně.
  • Moderní kanceláře v srdci Prahy. Naše prostory nejen skvěle vypadají, ale jsou i pohodlné a plné života.
  • Podpora vzdělávání a kariérního růstu. Záleží nám na vašem profesním i osobním rozvoji. Zajistíme vám odborné kurzy, certifikace nebo plně hrazené jazykové vzdělávání. Ať už chcete růst horizontálně nebo vertikálně, máte u nás prostor.
  • Přátelská atmosféra na firemních akcích. Těšte se na sportovní aktivity, týmové výjezdy nebo celofiremní setkání. A Mikuláš? To je už naše tradice.

Pokud vás to zaujalo, těšíme se na vaše CV! Podívejte se na náš profil na Atmoskopu, kde najdete další detaily i pohled zaměstnanců: Atmoskop – RENOMIA.

O pobočce

Staňte se součástí příběhu RENOMIA – rodinné firmy s vizí, kde kancelář není jen místem, ale centrem spolupráce.

Jaké to v RENOMIA je? Jak fungujeme? Pro někoho „jen kancelář“. Pro nás prostor, kde vznikají nápady a strategie, které přinášejí jistotu klientům. Přidejte se k nám a staňte se součástí české rodinné firmy se silným mezinárodním zázemím.

title: Embedded Software Tester - Student
description_html:
For our teams in Roznov p.R. and Brno we are looking for the Embedded Software Developer - Student

NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ: NXPI) enables secure connections for a smarter world, advancing solutions that make lives easier, better, and safer. As the world leader in secure connectivity solutions for embedded applications, NXP is driving innovation in the automotive, industrial & IoT, mobile, and communication infrastructure markets. Built on more than 60 years of combined experience and expertise, the company has approximately 29,000 employees in more than 30 countries and posted revenue of $8.61 billion in 2020.

💡We May Have a Fantastic OPPORTUNITY For You

See your knowledge come to life in next generation vehicles, smart homes and cities, future industry facilities and communications.

If you're interested in embedded software development, automotive functional safety, applications development and more - you're THE ONE we may meet in our R&D Centers in Roznov or Brno.

🚀 Ready to join the future of innovation in our team at NXP?

The ROM team build the first code that runs on a microcontroller - ROM-embedded software that kickstarts the system, sets up the hardware, and locks down security. It’s lean, fast, and built to last. We collaborate closely with hardware, validation, and security teams to ensure everything works seamlessly from power-on to production.

🔍 Responsibilities – What We Do

  • Analysis of system-level functional and architectural requirements
  • Verification of firmware implementation against hardware and security specifications
  • Embedded software testing and root-cause analysis
  • Design and development of automated test scenarios and validation pipelines
  • Structured reporting of test results and coverage metrics
  • Close collaboration with international teams across hardware, validation, and security domains

💻 Technical Knowledge – What You Bring

We expect you to have:

  • Basic understanding of software development, testing, or validation.
  • Familiarity with C programming, especially in the context of embedded systems.

It’s a big plus if you’ve had exposure to:

  • Python, ideally using Pytest for test automation
  • Tools like Git for version control and JIRA for task tracking
  • CI/CD systems such as Jenkins or Bamboo
  • Working in Linux environments
  • Target platforms like FPGA modules

🧩 Personal Skills – Who You Are

We’re looking for students who are curious, thoughtful, and ready to grow in a collaborative engineering environment. You don’t need to be an expert — what matters is your mindset and willingness to learn.

We Value

  • Analytical and logical thinking
  • Motivation to explore new technologies and workflows
  • Ability to work in a team and communicate across disciplines
  • Responsibility, independence, and a proactive attitude
  • Solid communication skills in English – both spoken and written

Whether you're just starting out or already have some hands-on experience, we’ll support your growth and help you build real-world skills in embedded software development.

🎯 What Can You Expect?

📝 Contract Type

Part-time / Temporary – flexible enough to fit your studies, but meaningful enough to build real experience.

📚 Development Opportunities

We believe that growing our people is key to growing our business. That’s why we offer a mix of online and offline learning opportunities to help you sharpen both your technical and soft skills.

🏢 Our Offices

We work in two locations – each with its own vibe:

  • Brno: A modern office with a fresh design, cozy rooms, and an in-house cafeteria.
  • Rožnov: A place with history and heart. A modern office with fresh design, and an in-house cafeteria. We love the relaxed atmosphere of the town and the wide selection of great restaurants, perfect for enjoying lunch with colleagues.

🚀 Hiring Process

Applying is quick and easy 😊

You are invited to apply on our career page with the resume and motivation letter in English for one or several open jobs at the same time.

You may submit the CV for more than 1 open position.

At the application stage, you should have a valid visa and work permit to work in Czech Republic.

🌟 And More... Life at NXP

Work is important, but so is everything around it. We start our days with free coffee and friendly chats. You can look forward to fresh fruit days, ice cream breaks, and even bake fairs.

We also organize social events like Christmas parties, family days, and food festivals. Want to give back? Join our charity initiatives and help us make a difference.

⏭️ What’s Next

Candidates are invited to apply on our career page with the resume and motivation letter in English for one or several open jobs at the same time.

The candidate may submit the CV for more than 1 open position.

At the application stage, all candidates should have a valid visa and work permit to work in Czech Republic.

If you’re excited about this opportunity, we kindly invite you to apply!

If you have any questions, we are happy to answer them. Please contact:

Alexandru Cocut, Talent Acquisition - alexandru.cocut@nxp.com

Please note: The successful candidate may/will be responsible for security related tasks. The assignment may/will be in scope of security certifications, therefore a conscious and reliable way of working is necessary.

More information about NXP in Czech Republic...

title: IT Analytik pro oblast Multikanálové komunikace
description_html:
Společnost E.ON Česká republika poskytuje odborný servis a poradenství všem ostatním společnostem skupiny E.ON v České republice. Přes tisíc našich specialistů a administrativních pracovníků se stará o produkty E.ONu, zákazníky a komunikaci celé firmy už více než 20 let. Zajišťují podporu v oblasti HR, IT, financí, práva, administrativy nebo komunikace.

Do našeho týmu Multichannel Communication Delivery hledáme motivovaného kolegu nebo kolegyni na pozici Analytik/čka / vývojář/ka multikanálové komunikace. Bude se podílet na návrhu a vývoji komunikace se zákazníky napříč různými kanály (např. e-mail, SMS, mobilní aplikace, web, chatbot, fyzický tisk). Vaší hlavní rolí bude porozumět požadavkům byznysu, navrhnout vhodné technické řešení a zajistit jeho realizaci a integraci do stávající IT architektury. Přidejte se k nám v Českých Budějovicích.

Co u nás budete dělat?

  • Budete analyzovat požadavky byznysových útvarů na zákaznickou komunikaci.
  • Na starosti budete mít porozumění požadavkům byznysu a jejich převod do technického řešení.
  • Součástí vaší práce bude realizace E2E BU požadavků od návrhu řešení, přes vývoj, customizaci, testování až po nasazení do produktivního provozu.
  • Čeká vás implementace kampaní a notifikací v nástrojích pro multikanálovou komunikaci.
  • Součástí Vaší práce bude také aplikační podpora uživatelů.
  • Nemine vás spolupráce s ostatními týmy v rámci organizace (Business, Marketing, UI/UX, Integration, apod.).

Co by měl splňovat ideální kandidát?

Dokonalost k vašim vlastnostem patřit nemusí, ale bez některých kvalit se neobejdeme...

  • jste středoškolsky nebo vysokoškolsky vzdělán v oboru IT, případně jiném technickém oboru
  • máte zkušenosti s analýzou a návrhem řešení BU požadavků
  • máte zkušenosti s programováním (python, javascript apod.), případně zkušenost s low code vývojem
  • orientujete se v integračních technologiích a rozhraních
  • html jazykem mluvíte na výbornou
  • vyznáte se ve standardech formátů výměny dat (XML, JSON)

Budeme nadšeni, pokud…

  • máte zkušenosti s některým z kampaňových komunikačních nástrojů (např. Bloomreach, MS Dynamics Sales, Adobe Campaign, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, apod.)
  • programovací jazyk ABAP pro Vás není španělskou vesnicí
  • máte alespoň základní ponětí o energetice
  • umíte navrhovat a číst UML diagramy
  • plánovat, komunikovat a fungovat v rámci cross funkčního týmu Vám nedělá problém
  • domluvíte se anglicky
  • jste aktivní řidič a nedělá Vám problém cestovat

Proč pracovat u nás v týmu?

  • Budete mít možnost pracovat s různými IT technologiemi.
  • Rozvineme Váš talent, stanete se součástí fajn týmu lidí, kteří si pomáhají a inspirují se.
  • Naučíme Vás rozumět energetice.
  • Přivítáme Vás v přátelském prostředí, chodíme na společné obědy a večeře, vánoční posezení, jezdíme na teambulding.

Proč je fajn pracovat u E.ONu?

  • Nejspíš to zní jako klišé, ale jsme stabilní nadnárodní společnost. Nemusíte se bát, že za týden zavřeme nebo vám tři měsíce nepřijde výplata.
  • 5 týdnů dovolené je u nás samozřejmostí.
  • Domů nebudete odcházet jen s atraktivní výplatou. Finanční bonusy u nás nejsou jen o 13. platu.
  • Nabízíme hybridní pracovní režim z kanceláře a home office.
  • Při významných životních nebo jiných událostech vám dáme placené volno i nad rámec zákoníku práce.
  • Budete moci čerpat z výjimečného balíčku zaměstnaneckých benefitů.
  • Poskytujeme příspěvek na stravování.
  • Můžete se u nás vzdělávat, rozvíjet své schopnosti a profesně růst, kam až to půjde.
  • Pracovní doba je u nás pružná. Někdy je nutné pracovat o trochu déle než obvykle, jindy je zas fajn odejít dřív.

Co byste ještě měl/a vědět?

Jsme E.ON. Dodáváme elektřinu a plyn více než 1,5 milionu zákazníků a jsme jedním z největších dodavatelů v Česku. Kromě energií nabízíme chytrá a úsporná řešení, jako jsou fotovoltaika, tepelná technika nebo elektromobilita. V jižních Čechách, na jižní Moravě a na Vysočině provozujeme vlastní distribuční soustavu elektřiny, v Jihočeském kraji se staráme i o distribuci plynu.

title: Application Security Analyst_#CFC Prague
description_html:
About us:

Accenture Cyber Fusion Center in Prague is unique group of more than 250+ people passionate about Information Security. We are looking for enthusiastic individual with a foundation in security, eager to learn and grow in the space of Information Security as Application Security Delivery Analyst.

Role Summary:

As our next Security Analyst, you will operate a Threat Exposure Management program, which may involve vulnerability scans on various technologies and platforms, care for timely and accurate analysis, reporting, support technical threat and vulnerability assessments, create customized vulnerability notifications/tickets and perform other advisory tasks to our clients. Further, you will support vulnerability/asset owners or engineering teams in remediation and mitigation activities and support in processes such as false positives investigation and exceptions handling.

Essential requirements:

We expect you to have a genuine interest in securing our clients’ systems and networks from attacks. More specifically, we are looking for:


  • Experience with application development in variety of programming and scripting languages (e.g., Java, Python, .NET).
  • Practical experience with application vulnerability scanning techniques, tools and automation (e.g., SAST, DAST, SCA, IaC).
  • Knowledge of cyber security principles, common application vulnerabilities and weaknesses, experience with infrastructure and cloud security.
  • Efficient communication skills, both spoken and written English, and ability to create and deliver reports in written and verbal forms (presentations).
  • Willingness to learn and grow.


    • Nice to have skills:


  • Proficient in Linux administration.
  • Expert programming/scripting skills (e.g., Java, JavaScript, Python, .NET).
  • Experience with setup and security of cloud (e.g., Azure, AWS, GCP).
  • Hands-on design, development, and deployment of custom unified reporting solutions.
  • Relevant IT security certifications (e.g., OSCP, CISSP, CSSLP, CompTIA Sec+, GSEC).
  • Knowledge of security standards and regulations (e.g., ISO 27001, SOX, PCI, NIST).
  • Genuine passion for self-education and keeping up with the industry.


    • We offer:


  • Opportunity to work on complex projects for some of the biggest companies in the world.
  • Chance to become a key member of delivery teams within managed security services.
  • Strong potential for growth and acceptance of added responsibilities.
  • Work in well-established international company with clear career growth possibilities.
  • Trainings, self-development and certification programs.

title: Software Developer Intern – Automated Testing
description_html:
Work Schedule

Standard (Mon-Fri)

Environmental Conditions

Office

We are looking for a motivated and self-driven Software Developer Intern to join our team focused on automated testing. In this role, you will evaluate the state of automated testing in our codebase, identify improvement opportunities, and build and implement automated tests that ensure our products’ quality and reliability.

Core Responsibilities

  • Evaluate current test coverage and identify automation opportunities.
  • Build or extend test automation frameworks using Python or C++
  • Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins).
  • Develop maintainable and scalable automated test cases.
  • Collaborate with developers, QA, and DevOps to align on priorities and troubleshoot issues.
  • Document how to run and extend automated tests for future contributors.
  • Continuously research and apply best practices in software testing and automation.

Requirements (Must-Haves)

  • Currently enrolled as a Bachelor’s, Master’s, or PhD student in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
  • Intermediate to advanced proficiency in Python, including understanding of key programming concepts (OOP, modules, exceptions, etc.).
  • Logical and structured problem-solving approach with ability to analyze and isolate testing or code issues.
  • Self-driven and proactive, capable of working independently with minimal supervision.
  • Good English proficiency (spoken and written) sufficient for daily cooperation and documentation.
  • Curiosity or experience in physics based complex analytical instruments (Electron microscopes, spectrometer, etc.)

Nice-to-Have Qualifications

  • Experience with C++ programming.
  • Familiarity with testing frameworks such as pytest, unittest, or Selenium.
  • Basic understanding of CI/CD tools like GitHub Actions or Jenkins.
  • Experience with Git for version control (branching, pull requests, commits).
  • Experience working with complex analytical hardware (microscopes, spectrometers, or similar).
  • Exposure to QA or testing-focused academic coursework or projects.

How do we motivate you?

  • work with us and be an important part of a company developing cutting-edge technologies for a scientific customers worldwide
  • flexible working schedule which enables you to easily combine work with your studies
  • brand new Hackerspace room equipped with VR headset, Recording studio for your videos, music or podcasts, Lego Mindstorms, 3D printer, Arduino and much more!
  • learning and development opportunities including English lessons. You don't have to worry about learning things without any support
  • free Multisport card
  • meal allowance and company canteen with free fruit or vegetables every day
  • modern work environment including relax zones, gym, outside playground and massages in the building
  • open and friendly company spirit - we have a company rock band, various sport teams etc.

title: IT Support / Aplikační podpora & E-commerce
description_html:
Společnost SAG CZ s.r.o. vyhlašuje výběrové řízení na pozici IT Support / Aplikační podpora & E-commerce. Staň se součástí IT týmu v inovativní společnosti Swiss Automotive Group CZ s.r.o. (dále jen SAG), která se specializuje na dodávky autodílů na českém trhu. Co vás na této pozici čeká

Co byste měli znát a umět

Jak si vás představujeme

Co nabízíme

title: Developer Associate in SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity
description_html:
We help the world run better

At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.

What You’ll Build

In this role, you'll drive the development and optimization of the SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity (MBC) solution. MBC is a specialized integration platform that connects SAP ERP customers with their banks to streamline banking operations. Your focus will be on enhancing third-party integrations, optimizing current processes, and ensuring the robustness of the system. You'll work on various development projects, including API integrations, to improve the overall user experience and drive business results. Your contributions will directly impact the reliability and efficiency of banking operations, enabling real-time services and data transactions.

What You Bring

  • Technical Skills: Experience with JavaScript/Node.js. Familiarity with multi-tenant SaaS applications and event-driven architectures.
  • Any experience with the Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP), SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry, CI/CD pipelines, Deploy with Confidence (DwC) or ABAP is a plus.
  • Analytical Abilities: Excellent analytical skills to understand and interpret API specifications and third-party system integrations.
  • Implementation: Proven ability to implement Fiori UIs and backend logic.
  • Documentation: Excellent documentation skills for creating operational guides.
  • Customer Focus: Ability to provide customer support and maintenance.
  • Mindset: An agile mindset, thriving in a fast-paced environment and shipping code frequently. Collaborative and team-oriented, with strong communication skills.

Where you belong

Join a global, agile team with developers in Ireland, Germany, Czech Republic, India, and China. Our culture values quality, security, and compliance, with regular audits to maintain SAP product standards. Thrive in an environment that encourages continuous learning and delivering impactful solutions. Experience the flexibility of shaping your work arrangement to suit your needs.

Our Benefits

  • You will get initial training on technical and business topics
  • SAP will provide continuous training to increase your qualification
  • Flexible working hours and home office option
  • SAP will fully refund salary for sick days (12 per year) and sick leaves (up to one month)
  • 5 weeks of vacation per year
  • Meal vouchers, fully paid by company
  • Company car and company phone according to the company car policy
  • Contribution to sport/culture/leisure

title: Intern – Global Real Estate Data Analyst
description_html:
Job Description

We have an opportunity to join our Real Estate team in Prague. Join a world-class global real estate organization that strives to drive change across a diverse real estate portfolio, through pro-active portfolio management. The real estate organization consists of an extremely strong team with a mandate from the Corporation; a solid foundation in place that includes industry-leading processes and tools; and an incomparable real estate analytics platform.

This role is part of our University Relations program, designed to help students and recent graduates launch their careers with hands-on experience, mentorship, and opportunities for growth within Honeywell.

We have been innovating for more than 100 years and now we’re creating what’s next. Our programs serve a global community and our hometowns too. We provide resources and financial support to causes around the world and encourage employee volunteerism. We are committed to the highest standard in everything we do!

Responsibilities

  • Assist in gathering and compiling data related to the leases database, property management data.
  • Conduct quantitative analyses to identify risks to the Honeywell operations.
  • Collaborate with Real Estate Managers to prepare reports and presentations, effectively communicating findings to stakeholders in English.
  • Stay updated on industry trends, market changes, and emerging technologies impacting the real estate sector.
  • Prepare reports and presentations to communicate findings and recommendations

Qualifications

  • University student currently pursuing a degree in Finance, Real Estate, Economics, Data Analytics, Civil Engineering or another related field. Interest in commercial real estate industry
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a keen attention to detail.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel; familiarity with PowerBI and other data analysis tools (e.g., SQL, Python, R) is a plus.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and meet deadlines.
  • Strong attention to detail and organizational skills. Ability to work effectively in a cross-functional team environment.

Our offer

  • Hands-on experience in international company working with international team.
  • Opportunity to develop data analysis and visualization skills.
  • If you are passionate about data and eager to learn more about real estate and portfolio – asset management, we encourage you to apply for this exciting internship opportunity at Honeywell
  • Clear pathways for advancement, regular feedback, and mentorship opportunities from experienced professionals in the field
  • Access to online training and certifications.
  • Flexible working arrangements and support for combining work with education.

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform crucial job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Join us now and become part of our journey - help us make the future!

#TheFutureIsWhatWeMakeIt

#Futureshaper

About Us

Honeywell helps organizations solve the world's most complex challenges in automation, the future of aviation and energy transition. As a trusted partner, we provide actionable solutions and innovation through our Aerospace Technologies, Building Automation, Energy and Sustainability Solutions, and Industrial Automation business segments – powered by our Honeywell Forge software – that help make the world smarter, safer and more sustainable.

title: Robotics QA Engineer
description_html:
Robotics QA Engineer – Shape the Future of Autonomous Mobile Robotics!


Are you passionate about robotics and eager to work at the forefront of software and hardware innovation? As a Robotics QA Engineer, you’ll ensure our Brightpick autonomous mobile robots reach peak reliability and performance. You will work directly with autonomous mobile robots in real-world environments, experiencing QA that goes beyond traditional software testing. From integrating and deploying new features to verifying performance in live environments, you’ll witness your impact first-hand.


If you’re ready to tackle exciting challenges, grow your expertise in robotics QA, and join a team that’s shaping the industry, this is the role for you. Join us to help create, test, and refine intelligent robotic solutions that drive the future of automation!


Location

Bratislava


Type of employment

Full-time


Core responsibilities:

  • Uncover hidden challenges: Be the detective that identifies even the most hidden glitches in our robotic systems.
  • Guarantee reliability: Evaluate new software features and verify that our robots deliver an efficient user experience.
  • Define and execute tests: Create comprehensive test scenarios for robotic platforms, ensuring new software versions meet our strict quality standards.
  • Maintain test procedures: Keep testing protocols up-to-date as product features evolve and SW/HW is upgraded.
  • Collaborate and report: Work closely with development teams to track, analyze, and resolve issues using bug-tracking tools.
  • Conduct manual & automated tests: Evaluate software in simulations, a real controlled environment, and potentially on-site.
  • Support deployment: Assist with on-site integration of new features and system roll-outs.
  • Document and replicate: Generate clear bug reports and replication scenarios so developers can swiftly address issues.
  • Assess new features: Analyze the system-wide impact of each release to guarantee overall stability and performance.
  • Stay connected: Communicate progress and insights with the QA, development, and project management teams to ensure smooth project delivery.
  • Stay ahead of the curve: Continuously expand your knowledge of our evolving robotics systems, making sure you’re always prepared to dive into our latest innovations.
  • (Optionally) Automate testing: Implement testing scripts using Python, C++, or testing frameworks to streamline quality checks.


Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a relevant field (Robotics, Engineering, Computer Science, etc.).
  • English proficiency: Upper-intermediate level (B2) or higher, fluent Slovak
  • A strong interest in autonomous systems, with a willingness to learn how hardware and software interact.
  • Basic Linux skills and a solid understanding of software testing principles.
  • Analytically driven, with a keen eye for detail and strong problem-solving abilities.

Nice to have:

  • Experience in robotics, mechatronics, or hardware integration
  • Python, C++, docker, Linux, testing libraries (e.g., Selenium, Cypress, Google Tests), Familiarity with UX/UI.
  • Version control (Git) proficiency.


Benefits:

  • Daily breakfast in the office
  • Option of working from home/hybrid work (in case the position allows it)
  • Flexible work schedule (in case the position allows it)
  • Sick days
  • Parking for everyone, bike storage with showers and changing rooms on site at our HQ
  • Rooftop terrace with nice view of Bratislava
  • Dog friendly office
  • Multisport Card
  • Referral program


Additional benefits you can choose from after 1st year:

  • Multisport Card (with company contribution)
  • Contribution to a recreation stay
  • Year-round healthcare access at ProCare
  • Supplementary pension contribution (III pilier)
  • Brain boost - budget for professional development
  • Annual public transportation pass
  • E-Shop voucher to buy anything you might need

title: Automate anual Tester
description_html:
Job Description

As a member of team, you will test scalable and secure applications that drive dynamic financial services. This team is responsible for enabling and disabling Base24 (payment engine) acquiring and for Terminal Management & Configurations, ensuring efficient and reliable operations that empower clients and shape the future of digital transactions.

Your future duties and responsibilities

What you will do:

  • Work with SCRUM Team members (3 amigo concept) to determine test approach for functionality and enhancements introduced during each SPRINT.
  • Design test cases (BDD) that are validating every USER STORY in scope of given cycle (sprint) in line with acceptance criteria defined.
  • Execute tests (both manual and automated), schedule test execution runs and reports on their results. Maintain and update automated tests every test execution cycle.
  • Coordinate various testing phases (smoke, regression, functional, integration).
  • Raise bugs when deviations from the acceptance criteria are observed as a result of the test execution.
  • Analyze and investigate issues arising from automation test runs.
  • Assist SCRUM team members on the issue resolution by providing comprehensive results of the test execution and reproducing bugs.
  • Participate in Agile ceremonies and technical discussions. 

Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role

  • What you will need to have: 
  • Previous professional experience with:
  • Backend testing
  • User Interface (UI) testing
  • Integration testing
  • Regression testing
  • Previous professional experience with:
  • SoapUI/Postman
  • GitLab
  • SQL
  • Gherkin
  • IntelliJ IDEA
  • Jira
  • Xray
  • Confluence 
  • Fluent English, due to work in an international environment, strong English skills are also required to enable easy communication in teams distributed across the world.
  • Location: 5days a week in Bratislava office is required

What do we offer?

  • Friendly working atmosphere and a stable background of one of the largest IT companies in the world
  • Support of your professional growth
  • Certified learning programs
  • Profit Participation Plan - participation in the company’s profit
  • Share purchase Plan – the possibility of purchasing employee shares
  • 3 sick-days for recovery
  • 30 days of fully paid sick leave
  • Benefit Plus Program for leisure activities
  • Referral bonus for referring a new colleague
  • Multisport card for sports and wellness facilities
  • The possibility of obtaining an interest-free loan
  • Language training
  • Vaccination against influenza and tick-borne encephalitis
  • Possibility of participation in various sports events
  • Member Assistance Program - possibility of using the advisory services of psychological and legal experts for health, work, or other serious life events

The base salary starts from 1800 to 3200 EUR/m. (gross). Final salary could be higher - it depends on skills and expertise of candidates.

Spoločne ako vlastníci prenášame odborné znalosti do praxe.

Život v spoločnosti CGI je založený na vlastníctve, tímovej práci, rešpekte a pocite spolupatričnosti. Tu môžete naplno rozvinúť svoj potenciál.

Pozývame vás, aby ste sa od prvého dňa stali vlastníkmi. Spoločne pracujeme na tom, aby sme náš sen premenili na skutočnosť. Preto sa označujeme za partnerov CGI, nie za zamestnancov. Ťažíme z nášho spoločného úspechu a máme možnosť a zodpovednosť aktívne sa podieľať na smerovaní a stratégii našej spoločnosti.

Vaša práca vytvára hodnoty. Budete rozvíjať inovatívne riešenia a trvalé vzťahy s kolegami a klientmi a zároveň budete mať prístup ku globálnym možnostiam, ktoré vám pomôžu premeniť nápady na skutočnosť, využiť nové príležitosti a využívať výhody špičkových odborných znalostí a technológií v odvetví.

Budete rozvíjať svoju kariéru tým, že sa pripojíte k spoločnosti, ktorá je vybudovaná, aby rástla a pretrvala. Podporia vás vedúci pracovníci, ktorým záleží na vašom zdraví a pohode a pomôžu vám využiť príležitosti na rozvoj vašich zručností a rozšírenie obzorov.

Pridajte sa k nám, k jednej z najväčších firiem poskytujúcich poradenské služby v oblasti IT na svete.

title: Digital Data Internship
description_html:
Hello, we’re L’Oréal, We're not just building brands, we're shaping how the world experiences beauty (and it takes a lot of cool jobs to do it). Intrigued? Keep reading, this might be the opportunity you've been searching for.

A Day in the Life

As a Digital Data Intern within our corporate CDMO team in Prague, you will play a key role in enhancing our internal programs, content and data operations. Reporting to the HUB E-commerce Director, you will support the seamless flow of information between our divisions and retail partners, making a tangible impact on our digital shelf presence.

YOU WILL: 

  • Be the main contact person for internal programs for content management towards different stakeholders
  • Work on syndication of content between divisions and retailers how to set up the process and lead smooth transition
  • Transition some data source into an automated environment (by building reports and databases) 
  • Maintain retailer channels and data mapping
  • Cooperate with colleagues from various business functions, brands, and markets.

Ideal Profile

  • Are a fast learner and a university student (Data Science, Information Technologies, Business, Marketing ,etc.)  
  • Available to work 25-32h weekly
  • Are you passionate about data and numbers are your language (advanced MS Excel user) 
  • Are you passionate about PowerBI/SQL user, front-end Power BI data modeling/visualization and data transformation/manipulation (Power BI, Looker, Tableau)  
  • Are a precise, well-organized, and pro-active person with an innovative approach to problem-solving. 
  • Are fluent in Czech/Slovak and in English 

What L'Oréal Can Offer You

  • Competitive compensation and employee benefits
  • Work-life balance: Flexible working hours and a hybrid work model
  • Mentorship and development: Opportunities to learn from experienced professionals and expand your network
  • Real-world experience: Gain practical experience that will set you apart in the job market
  • Potential career opportunities: This internship could lead to exciting future roles at L'Oréal.

Who We Are

L'Oréal is the world's #1 beauty company, present in over 150 markets. For over a century, we have been transforming the beauty industry, fueled by data, technology, innovation, and science. We are committed to diversity, equity, and inclusion, and we strive to create a workplace where everyone feels valued and respected.

Ready to unleash your creativity and make your mark? Apply now!
